it looks like you generated this code with AI, which is fine in itself.  However, it doesn't look like you reviewed the generated code to see if it makes sense and is addressing the problem in the simplest way possible.  You need to take time to review the generated code to confirm that you understand what it is doing and correct any issues.

commit.subject: LU-18359 mdd: Handle jobid strings with surrounding quotes
commit.message:
LU-18359 mdd: Handle jobid strings with surrounding quotes

Updated logic in mdd_dir.c to properly handle jobid
strings already enclosed in quotes.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Aryan Gupta <argupta@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Iea9834faaf356fea52cbda722c08c622bb821dee
